zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Gifford於1550年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾金斯 索波內時，他的父親Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett20歲，母親Ann Goring20歲。他於1572年與Susanna Brounker在英國哈普爾金斯 索波內結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1592年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼享年42歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾易亞斯特 泰黑利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Gifford于1550年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾金斯 索波內时，他的父亲Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett20岁，母亲Ann Goring20岁。他于1572年与Susanna Brounker在英国哈普爾金斯 索波內结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1592年在英国英格兰薩默塞特奧爾哈德 波特曼享年42岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾易亞斯特 泰黑利。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Gifford was born in 1550, in Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett, was 20 and his mother, Ann Goring, was 20. He married Susanna Brounker in 1572, in Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1592, in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in East Tytherley, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Gifford est né en 1550, à Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ann Goring, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Brounker en 1572, à Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1592, à Orchard Portman, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à East Tytherley, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Gifford 1550 in Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett 20 und seine Mutter Ann Goring 20. Er hat 1572 in Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England Susanna Brounker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1592 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in East Tytherley, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Gifford è nato il nel 1550 nel Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Ann Goring, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Brounker nel 1572, nel Kings Somborne, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Henry Giffordが1550年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアキングズ ソンボルンで生まれた時，父Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrettは20歳，母Ann Goringは20歳であった。1572年にイギリスハンプシュアイアキングズ ソンボルンでSusanna Brounkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1592年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトオルチャード ポルトマンで42歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアエアスト トイスエルリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Gifford(이)가 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 킨그스 서본에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Goring(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1572년 영국 함프실르 킨그스 서본에서 Susanna Brounker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 오처드 포트먼에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 이스트 타이더리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Gifford nasceu em 1550, em Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ann Goring, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Brounker em 1572, em Kings Somborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Gifford родился в 1550 г. в местности кингс сомборн, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Capt Richard Gifford of Bally Magarrett было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Goring, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Brounker в 1572 г. в местности кингс сомборн, хампшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1592 г. в местности орчард портман, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст титирли, хампшир, Англия.
